question_text: A book is resting on a table. Which pair of forces shows a contact force and a non-contact force acting on the book?

options.label: A
options.text: The push from your hand and the pull of gravity

options.label: B
options.text: The push from the table and air resistance

options.label: C
options.text: The pull of gravity and the pull of a magnet

options.label: D
options.text: The push from the table and the push from your hand

explanation: A contact force requires objects to be touching (like a push from your hand), while a non-contact force acts at a distance (like gravity). Option A correctly identifies the push from your hand as contact and gravity as non-contact.
